_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Cnp-Cre; Nf1f/f; Ptenf/+ mice had a significantly decreased median survival of 101 days compared to control Cnp-Cre; Nf1f/+ (185 days, Logrank p=0.017) and Cnp-Cre; Ptenf/+ (323 days, Logrank p<0.0001)
details: Cnp-Cre; Nf1f/f; Ptenf/+ mice had significantly decreased median survival of 101 days compared to control Cnp-Cre; Nf1f/+ (185 days, p=0.017) and Cnp-Cre; Ptenf/+ (323 days, p<0.0001)
